issues.title: Fix Inconsistent MCP Server Capabilities Configuration
issues.body:
Currently, the MCP Server has inconsistent handling of capabilities configuration. Capabilities are only enabled if corresponding handlers are provided during initialization, which prevents dynamically adding tools, resources, or prompts later.

### Requirements

1. Separate capability declaration from handler registration
2. Allow capabilities to be enabled independently of whether handlers are initially provided
3. Enable tools, resources, prompts, and completions to be added after server initialization
4. Add support for completions capabilities

### Expected Behavior

- Capabilities should be enabled based on configuration, not handler presence
- Server should allow registering new handlers at runtime for already enabled capabilities
